SEARCH
Package com.unimib.assignment3.service

Class SupervisorService

java.lang.Object
com.unimib.assignment3.service.EmployeeService
com.unimib.assignment3.service.SupervisorService
@Service public class SupervisorService extends EmployeeService
Service class for managing Supervisor entities.

Provides CRUD operations, assignment and removal of subordinates, and ensures that cyclic supervisor-subordinate relationships are prevented.

  • Constructor Details

    • SupervisorService

      public SupervisorService()

  • Method Details

    • saveSupervisor

      public Supervisor saveSupervisor(@NonNull Supervisor supervisor)
      Saves a supervisor to the database.

      Checks for email uniqueness before saving.

      Parameters:
      supervisor - the supervisor to save (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the saved supervisor entity
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the supervisor is null or the email is not unique

    • createSupervisor

      public Supervisor createSupervisor(@NonNull String name, @NonNull String surname)
      Creates a new supervisor with the given name and surname.
      Parameters:
      name - the supervisor's name (must not be null)
      surname - the supervisor's surname (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a new Supervisor instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name or surname is null

    • createSupervisor

      public Supervisor createSupervisor(@NonNull String name, @NonNull String surname, @NonNull EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Creates a new supervisor with the given name, surname, and role.
      Parameters:
      name - the supervisor's name (must not be null)
      surname - the supervisor's surname (must not be null)
      employeeRole - the supervisor's role (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a new Supervisor instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name, surname, or role is null

    • createSupervisor

      public Supervisor createSupervisor(@NonNull String name, @NonNull String surname, double monthlySalary, @NonNull EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Creates a new supervisor with the given name, surname, salary, and role.
      Parameters:
      name - the supervisor's name (must not be null)
      surname - the supervisor's surname (must not be null)
      monthlySalary - the supervisor's monthly salary
      employeeRole - the supervisor's role (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a new Supervisor instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name, surname, or role is null

    • createSupervisor

      public Supervisor createSupervisor(@NonNull String name, @NonNull String surname, double monthlySalary, @NonNull EmployeeRole employeeRole, Supervisor supervisor, List<Supervisor> subordinates)
      Creates a new supervisor with full details including supervisor, subordinates, and supervised teams.
      Parameters:
      name - the supervisor's name (must not be null)
      surname - the supervisor's surname (must not be null)
      monthlySalary - the supervisor's monthly salary
      employeeRole - the supervisor's role (must not be null)
      supervisor - the supervisor's supervisor (must not be null)
      subordinates - the list of subordinates (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a new Supervisor instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any required argument is null

    • checkRole

      protected void checkRole(EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Validates that the role is at least EmployeeRole.SW_ARCHITECT.
      Parameters:
      employeeRole - the role to check
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the role is below SW_ARCHITECT

    • findSupervisorById

      public Optional<Supervisor> findSupervisorById(@NonNull Long supervisorId)
      Finds a supervisor by ID.
      Parameters:
      supervisorId - the supervisor's ID (must not be null)
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the supervisor if found
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException - if the supervisor does not exist

    • findAllSupervisors

      public List<Supervisor> findAllSupervisors()
      Retrieves all supervisors.
      Returns:
      a list of all supervisors

    • deleteSupervisorById

      public void deleteSupervisorById(@NonNull Long supervisorId)
      Deletes a supervisor by ID.
      Parameters:
      supervisorId - the ID of the supervisor to delete (must not be null)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the supervisorId is null

    • assignSubordinate

      public void assignSubordinate(@NonNull Long supervisorId, @NonNull Long subordinateId)
      Assigns a subordinate to a supervisor.

      Prevents cyclic supervisor-subordinate relationships. If a cycle is detected, the assignment is reverted and an IllegalStateException is thrown.

      Parameters:
      supervisorId - the supervisor's ID (must not be null)
      subordinateId - the subordinate's ID (must not be null)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the assignment would create a cyclic hierarchy

    • removeSubordinate

      public void removeSubordinate(@NonNull Long supervisorId, @NonNull Long subordinateId)
      Removes a subordinate from a supervisor.
      Parameters:
      supervisorId - the supervisor's ID (must not be null)
      subordinateId - the subordinate's ID (must not be null)

    • findSupervisorsWithoutSupervisor

      public List<Supervisor> findSupervisorsWithoutSupervisor()
      Finds supervisors who do not have a supervisor.

      These are considered the top-level supervisors in the hierarchy.

      Returns:
      a list of top-level supervisors

    • findSupervisorsWithoutSubordinates

      public List<Supervisor> findSupervisorsWithoutSubordinates()
      Finds supervisors who do not have any subordinates.

      Useful to determine potential candidates to assign new subordinates.

      Returns:
      a list of supervisors without subordinates

    • findSupervisorsWithoutSupervisedTeam

      public List<Supervisor> findSupervisorsWithoutSupervisedTeam()
      Finds supervisors who do not supervise any teams.
      Returns:
      a list of supervisors without supervised teams
